title: commerce.record_payment@1.0.0 args — floor HIGH; records a payment FACT; the System derives financial status

event.description: The payment fact. The System derives the order's financial status; this verb never sets a status field (GAP-001).

amount.description: Optional hint; the System resolves the authoritative amount from the order/payment of record (§6.3). A Speaker-declared amount never overrides it.

$comment: Floor HIGH: asserts money moved/returned. Replaces the payment axis of commerce.update_order_status. The adapter maps the fact onto its derived financial status.
